content: Output exactly 160 JSONL records and no Markdown. Each line must be an object with fields id (RUN-0001 through RUN-0160), model (alternating qwen3.6-27b and qwen3.6-35b-a3b), prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, decode_tok_s, mtp_acceptance, status, and tags. Use deterministic arithmetic progressions, status values ok/warn in a 4:1 pattern, and two tags per record. Every line must parse independently as strict JSON.
